name: KIRAI ANKOKU
title: ENVOY OF THE COURT

abilities.name: Prison of Guilt
abilities.text: When this model declares an action, it may remove a Spiritual Chains token from a model within 6" to add one suit of its choice to its duel total.

abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Soul Siphon
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" with an Adversary token suffer a (-) to Df and Wp duels.

actions.name: Sundering
actions.costs_and_restrictions: For each raise this action receives, one ally engaged with the target may declare an attack action (to a maximum of 2).

triggers.name: Gang Up
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage for each other ally within 1" of the target, to a maximum of +2.

actions.name: "You..."
actions.effects: The target gains an Adversary token.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Pain
triggers.text: Remove a Spiritual Chains token from the target. Deal 2 damage to the target and draw a card.

actions.name: Pour Out Your Hate
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Remove a Spiritual Chains token from target enemy.
actions.effects: Summon a Urami minion in base contact with this model or the target.

triggers.name: Into Mist
triggers.text: While resolving the generated action, the target may move through enemy models and is unaffected by terrain.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='ENVOY OF THE COURT' back='Envoy of the Court'
extraction_notes: The 'Spiritual Anchor' ability has no visible text on the card front - appears to be a header or section marker only
Pour Out Your Hate has TN marked with asterisk (*) in original, transcribed as null since no numeric value present
